title: The Diplomatic and Consular Officers (Oaths and Fees) (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 1973
full_text: The Diplomatic and Consular Officers (Oaths and Fees) (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 1973 राजनयिक और कौंसलीय आफिसर (शपथ और फीस)(जम्‍मू-कश्‍मीर पर विस्‍तार) अधिनियम, 1973 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197302 Act Number: 02 Enactment Date: 1973-03-13 Act Year: 1973 Short Title: The Diplomatic and Consular Officers (Oaths and Fees) (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 1973 Hindi Title: राजनयिक और कौंसलीय आफिसर (शपथ और फीस)(जम्‍मू-कश्‍मीर पर विस्‍तार) अधिनियम, 1973 Long Title: An Act to provide for the extension of the Diplomatic and Consular Officers (Oaths and Fees) Act, 1948 to the State of Jammu and Kashmir. Ministry: Ministry of External Affairs Enforcement Date: 13-03-1973 Last Updated: 18-03-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Diplomatic and Consular Officers (Oaths and Fees) (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 1973 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Extension of Act 41 of 1948. Section 3. Repealed.
